name: frontier_factory
description: Battle Factory hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane) + the NEW rental-loan mechanic (FrontierManager, showrunner directive 2026-07-19). TWO parts. Part A - the loan cycle, deterministic and fight-free: Noland's dialog gains 'Take the loan - park your team' (frontier factory start: the whole party is serialized into hall custody and three Company-issue loaners are granted - Metagross/Arcanine/Gyarados lv70, FACTORY_LOANERS order) and an ungated 'Close the loan' (frontier factory return: loaners clawed by uuid, parked party restored in slot order). Asserted via the client party op: pre-loan 6-slot echo (KeyError hard-fail), loan roster as literal species+levels, post-return roster against the pre-loan snapshot vars. Loaners are NEVER fought on here - first-legal-move autobattle on lv70 loaners is not deterministic. Part B - the hall fights UNPARKED, exactly the shipped chain: Technician Rex and Engineer Lydia (one_time challengers, defeat tags fire via TBCS onwin, achievementOnDefeat is null by design so the DIALOG gate is the progression), then Factory Head Noland (brain, battle button gated all_tags on both challenger defeats) whose on_win runs frontier/hall_cleared ('A Frontier hall falls.' actionbar + the seven-hall counter) and tags frontier_factory_cleared. Factory fights stay dialog do:battle by design - the manager owns no Factory fight, so win_lines still fire. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery: gate.champion lowers to the player tag royal_league_champion (content_compile line 205ff) - the test player has NOT cleared the Royal League, so the tag is added in the preamble and stripped in cleanup (it also renders the loan button, which carries the same champion gate as a level-cap-leak guard). Fights run under dev-bot autobattle with the wonder team (brains fight at the ceiling; frontier fights are never level-locked). Site is the shipped RCT frontier cluster at y159 - inside the frontier_active region-tick AABB, so NuzlockeInit suspends faint damage/party removal/whiteout (the safe-exhibition promise) - but the atlas-intent [4060 64 2774] re-survey is still open, hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: the intermittent TBCS battle-init stall (and the rarer showdown engine wedge) means a win-wait timeout is almost certainly NOT a hall regression - re-run before filing (wedge recovery: blind rctapi maps then dev showdown revive).

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario, then sweep a stale battle (stopbattle fires no event; the sleep lets TBCS liveness settle) --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep below + the 40b hall latches spawn Rex/Lydia/Noland if the world is fresh). Coordinate is the shipped RCT Factory bench line (ch1 3809.5 / ch2 3815.5 at z2962.5, brain 3812.5 z2968.5), stood 2b north - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

-- loan residue strip (part A idempotency): a failed prior run can leave the party in factory custody with loaners on the belt - factory start would then refuse ('already in custody') and the party reset below would take the WRONG mons while the parked team stays stranded. factory return refuses politely when nothing is parked, so this is safe to run blind --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative frontier factory return

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage. Armor stands excluded (TBCS anchors), NPC bodies + pokemon excluded

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the three bodies persist and are never killed here --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup - later scenarios assume a fresh low-badge player
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses (no_defeated_factory_challenger_* and no_frontier_factory_cleared) after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared --

-- party reset: junk lv-5 parties from earlier scenarios stall TBCS battle init (verified live in wheat_war). Empty all six slots, then 2x lv-100 Garchomp - attrition headroom for three straight ceiling fights --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 — every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- PART A: the loan cycle (frontier factory start/return - deterministic, no fights). The wonder team is parked as-is; the loaners are never battled (first-legal-move autobattle on lv70 loaners is not deterministic). Noland body: the latch was re-armed above and placements run every tick with the player 8b away, so he respawns within moments of the tp --

steps.comment_: party-sync settle after the givemon wave + latch respawn window for the fresh Noland body
transcript evidence + hard count assert: KeyError (step FAIL) if fewer than 6 mons synced - custody must park the FULL wonder team for the restore assert to mean anything

steps.expect_screen_text: Take the loan - park your team
steps.comment_: loan button renders = champion gate + command wiring assert (button labels are stable across say[] rotation)
the ungated close button is always available - the command itself refuses politely when nothing is parked

steps.click: Take the loan - park your team

steps.comment_: command buttons have no close action; the swap runs server-side while the dialog stays up

steps.wait_chat: Your team is logged into custody
steps.comment_: FrontierManager.factoryStart custody line (Java-emitted; lint sees the string literal)
server->client party sync after the 6-out/3-in swap before the client party op reads it

steps.rcon: say [e2e frontier_factory] loan party: {loanA.party.0.species} lv{loanA.party.0.level} / {loanA.party.1.species} lv{loanA.party.1.level} / {loanA.party.2.species} lv{loanA.party.2.level}
steps.comment_: KeyError (step FAIL) if fewer than 3 loaners synced; the wait below then asserts EXACT species/order/levels

steps.wait_chat: (?i)loan party: metagross lv70 / arcanine lv70 / gyarados lv70
steps.comment_: FACTORY_LOANERS order is deterministic (party emptied first, loaners added in array order); (?i) shields against species-name casing
re-find before the close leg (approach context; the body can drift a step on its look objective)

steps.wait_chat: Loan closed. 6 of your own returned
steps.comment_: factoryReturn restore line - count 6 is deterministic (preA echo above hard-failed unless 6 were parked)
sync settle before the post-restore party read
KeyError (step FAIL) unless all 6 slots are back
restore fidelity: post roster must equal the pre-loan snapshot in slot order (loaners removed first leaves the party empty, PartyStore.add refills in parked order)
cheap guard before part B: restored mons carry pre-park HP (already healed, but the fainted-lead pass-loop failure mode is too expensive to risk)

steps.comment: -- PART B: the hall fights, fought UNPARKED on the wonder team. beat 1: Technician Rex, the first rental bench. say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable battle-button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up

steps.wait_chat: The rental held and so did you
steps.comment_: Rex's onwin win_line say; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
battle teardown settle before the next TBCS dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Engineer Lydia, the swap bench --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Factory Head Noland. His battle button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_factory_cleared tag -> win say -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Noland's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_factory_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers both rotating say lines --

expect_screen_text: You broke the house on borrowed steel. I designed every bench in this hall and none of it was enough. The Factory is yours.
Rentals only, and you still cleared the top floor. Old management would have hated that - a thing they built to be lent, walking out the door beaten.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set (champion surgery + defeat ladder + hall clear) so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD prizes ride (the prize rail has no reset, miller_walk precedent) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
